folio.label: 8r
folio.l: Wheræä it were cold , hote , moist , or drye
And wher of it engendered , and of what humoå
He was a verray ¹fyt´ practisour
The cause he knew , and of his harm the rote
A non he ©af , the syke man his bote
Ful redy had he , alle hise appoticaries
To sende hi~ dragges , and his lettuaries
For eche of he~ , mad other for to wynne
Her Frenshipe , was nat newe , to bygynne
Wel knew he , the old Esculapiu~s .
And deiscorides , and eke Rusus
Olde ypocras , and Galyen
Serapyou~ , Razis , and Auy©en
Auuerrois , Dasmacien , and Costantyn
Bernard´ , Gatisden~ , and Gilbertyn
Of his diete , mesurable was he
For he was , of no su¹fluite
But of gret norisshyng , and digestible
His stody was but litel , in the bible
In Sangweyn , and in pers , clad w alle
Lyned w taffata , and sendalle
And ©et he was but esy , of dispence
For he kept æ he wan , in the pestilence
For gold in phisyk , is accordiaÂ
Therfore he loued gold , in speciaÂ
A good wyf æäe was , of beside bathe
But she was somdel def , & æ was skathe
Of cloth makyng , she had swich an haunt
That she passed hem , of ypris & of gaunt
In aÂ the ¹yssú , wyf was there non
That to offryng´ , a forn~ hire shuld gon
And if there dide , serteyn so wroth was she
That she was oute , of al charite
Hire kerches , were of fyn ground´
I durst swere , they weyed doun a pound´
That on the Sonday , were vp on hire hede
Hire hosen were , of fyn skarlet rede
Ful streite teyed , and shoon moist & newe
Bold was hire face , and feir and rede of hewe
She was a worthy wo~man , al hire lyue
Housbondes at æe chirche dore , had she had fyue
W outen other companye , in hire ©outhe
But ther of nedeth nat , to speke of nouthe
